PowerShell($body = @{username='admin';password='admin'} | ConvertTo-Json; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; $token = $login.token; $headers = @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; $projects = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/projects" -Headers $headers; $projects.data | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.project_code\) | $\($_.status\) | $\($_.current_step\) | Risk: $\($_.risk_level\) | $\($_.project_name\)" })

PowerShell($body = @{username='admin';password='admin'} | ConvertTo-Json; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; $headers = @{Authorization="Bearer $\($login.token\)"}; $kpis = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/projects/stats/kpis" -Headers $headers; $kpis | Format-List)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $content = $r.Content; if \($content -match "error|Error"\) { Write-Host "Found error in page" } else { Write-Host "Page loads OK" }; Write-Host $content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(2000, $content.Length\)\) } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($body = @{username='admin';password='admin'} | ConvertTo-Json; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; $headers = @{Authorization="Bearer $\($login.token\)"}; try { $status = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/reports/summary/status" -Headers $headers; Write-Host "Status API:"; $status | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.status\): $\($_.count\)" } } catch { Write-Host "API Error: $_" })
